extracted_at.description: When insights were extracted (ISO format or null)

summary.description: One-sentence summary of the email's purpose/content

test_cases.user_prompt:
Extract insights from this email:

Subject: Unlimited Diagrams, AI Driven Tools, Stronger Privacy
From: team@mermaidchart.com
Body:
Mermaid Pro/Enterprise offers a large set of features designed to reduce your workload and simplify complex diagramming tasks. With Pro, you'll get:

Unlimited Mermaid AI Assistance - Build as many visuals or ask as many questions as you'd like with unlimited Mermaid AI credits.
Unlimited Personal and Organization Diagram Files - Create, store and manage your diagrams all in one place.
Unlimited AI Diagram Repair - Instantly troubleshoot and polish your diagrams with AI Diagram repair.
Enhanced Data Confidentiality - Pro and Enterprise user diagram data will never be used to train our models.

Enterprise users also get:
Single Sign On - Keep your data within your Org space with SSO and prevent documentation loss.
Dedicated Customer Success Manager - Get tailored Mermaid support from one of our CSM's for you and your team!

Try Mermaid Pro/Enterprise today and get one week completely free!
Start My 7-Day Free Trial

548 Market St PMB 75432 San Francisco, CA, 94104
